title: notifications-in-app — OpenTelemetry metrics
description: Channel-specific metrics. Aggregate delivery outcomes are captured in core's metrics.json labelled by channel; these are the drill-down metrics only in-app cares about.

metrics.name: academorix.notifications.in_app.broadcast.duration_ms
metrics.description: Reverb dispatch duration. Should stay < 25ms P99.

metrics.name: academorix.notifications.in_app.reverb.active_connections
metrics.description: Live socket count on the workspace Reverb instance. Sampled every 30s.

metrics.name: academorix.notifications.in_app.reverb.subscribed_channels
metrics.description: Distinct subscribed channels. Should stay < active_connections * 2 (each user typically subscribes to their own notifications channel + a workspace-scope channel).
